en.name: Level 96 — Solace
en.shortDescription: An abandoned Levantine mansion offering refuge from conflict, where visitors find peace through familiar sensory memories.
en.atmosphere: Serene yet melancholic: traditional architecture, dusty rooms and finely patterned windows overlooking distant mountains.
en.tips: Let the familiar comforts settle you — the carpet, the smell of coffee. This peace comes with a permanent separation from the outside.
